creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Don’t miss the dazzling lights at Palm Jumeirah this DSF!

#DubaLights Sea Wonder features ocean-themed light and water displays. Here are the spots where you can find them:

🐬 The Pointe: vibrant lights and exciting events by the beach
⭐️ Nakheel Mall: Sea-themed installations 
💗 Palm West Beach: Colorful arc lights along the beach strip

Plan your visit now. Tag your family and friends! 

@celebratedubai @styledbydubai @nakheelmallpalm @thepointepalm @palmwestbeach
